nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: Stephen's lorikeet
nodes.summary: Stephen's lorikeet（Stephen's lorikeet，学名 Vini stepheni），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss and the accidental introduction of predators to the island

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Due to their extremely limited range, the main threat to the survival of the lorikeets is the accidental introduction of predators to Henderson Island and habitat loss due to deforestation or natural disasters
